items.caption: A collection of digital art brushes designed for painting landscapes, grass, and foliage. the brushes are presented in a vertical arrangement against a gray background, with each brush stroke showcasing a different texture and style. the topmost brush has a loose, wispy texture, while the ones below it become progressively more defined and detailed, mimicking the appearance of grass and foliage. the bottommost brush has a more textured, almost brushstroke-like quality, suggesting the effect of a real brush on paper. the image also contains text that reads "digital fine art ma-brush collection," indicating the name of the brush set and its purpose.
